name: Goblin Biker Boom Mach
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>百鬼羅刹</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゴブリンライダー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>神速</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マッハ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ブーン
desc: Once per Chain, during the Main Phase, if this card is in your hand or GY (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 Xyz Material from a monster on either field, and if you do, Special Summon this card, also you cannot Special Summon "Goblin Biker Boom Mach" until the end of the next turn.
mnst_eff: Once per Chain, during the Main Phase, if this card is in your hand or GY (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 Xyz Material from a monster on either field, and if you do, Special Summon this card, also you cannot Special Summon "Goblin Biker Boom Mach" until the end of the next turn.
eff: Once per Chain, during the Main Phase, if this card is in your hand or GY (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 Xyz Material from a monster on either field, and if you do, Special Summon this card, also you cannot Special Summon "Goblin Biker Boom Mach" until the end of the next turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
